channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🚢 Trump Announces "Project Freedom" to Escort Ships Through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: President Trump announced a US military effort starting Monday to guide stranded commercial vessels through the Iran-controlled Strait of Hormuz. Iran immediately warned that any US interference would constitute a ceasefire violation.

item.title: ⚠️ Iran Warns US Hormuz Operation Would Violate Ceasefire
item.description: A senior Iranian parliament official stated that any US interference in the Strait of Hormuz maritime regime would be considered a ceasefire violation. CENTCOM said the operation would involve destroyers, 100+ aircraft, and 15,000 service members.

item.title: 🛢️ OPEC+ Agrees Third Output Quota Hike Since Hormuz Closure
item.description: OPEC+ has agreed to a third increase in oil production quotas since the Strait of Hormuz was effectively closed due to the Iran war. The increase remains largely theoretical as long as Gulf oil shipments are disrupted.

item.title: 💰 Oil Prices Ease After Trump Hormuz Escort Announcement
item.description: Oil prices fell after President Trump announced the US would help free ships stranded in the Strait of Hormuz. However, prices remained above $100 per barrel as no US-Iran peace deal has been reached.

item.title: ✈️ Israel Approves Purchase of New F-35 and F-15IA Fighter Squadrons
item.description: Israel gave final approval for a plan to purchase two new combat squadrons of F-35 and F-15IA advanced fighter aircraft from Lockheed Martin and Boeing in a deal worth tens of billions of dollars.

item.title: 🇴🇲 Iranian drones strike Oman oil storage facility at Salalah port
item.description: Iran expanded attacks beyond the Strait of Hormuz, hitting fuel storage tanks at Oman's Port of Salalah — a key alternative route for tankers bypassing the blocked strait. The strike marks an escalation in the campaign targeting regional energy infrastructure.

item.title: 🛢️ Oil surges past $120/barrel as Trump rejects Iran overture
item.description: Brent crude hit its highest level of the conflict after Trump maintained the naval blockade of Iranian ports. The UAE announced it would leave OPEC on May 1 to respond to market shortages without cartel constraints.

item.title: 🏛️ Former head of Pentagon's think tank joins Anthropic
item.description: The former director of the Pentagon's Office of Net Assessment has joined AI company Anthropic, raising questions about the intersection of defense analysis and artificial intelligence development.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China stages navy drill as US and Philippines embark on Balikatan 2026
item.description: China conducted naval exercises near the Philippines as US-Filipino forces launched their annual Balikatan military exercises, highlighting tensions in the South China Sea region.

item.title: 💰 Kashkari says Iran war limits Fed's ability to provide rate guidance
item.description: Minneapolis Fed President Neel Kashkari said the longer the Iran war continues, the greater the risks of higher inflation and economic damage, limiting how much guidance the central bank should provide on rate policy.

item.title: 🚢 Trump says US will help free up ships from Strait of Hormuz starting Monday
item.description: President Trump announced the US would begin an effort on Monday to guide ships stranded in the Strait of Hormuz. Hundreds of vessels and some 20,000 seafarers have been stuck in the Persian Gulf since the war began.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump says China and Iran are both problems, but they are different problems
item.description: President Trump drew distinctions between the challenges posed by China and Iran, suggesting different strategic approaches to each as the conflict with Tehran continues.

item.title: 🇻🇦 US Secretary of State to travel to Vatican, Italy
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio is scheduled to visit the Vatican and Italy for diplomatic talks as the Iran conflict continues.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK set to enter talks to join EU's £105.9 billion Ukraine loan
item.description: Britain is preparing to join the European Union's massive loan package for Ukraine, signaling continued Western support for Kyiv amid the ongoing conflict with Russia.

item.title: 🇲🇦 Two US troops missing during African Lion exercise in Morocco
item.description: Two US service members are missing during the African Lion military exercise in Morocco, according to US Africa Command.

item.title: 💨 Trump administration cites national security to halt US wind farm projects
item.description: The Trump administration has brought US onshore wind development to a halt by citing national security concerns, according to the Financial Times.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel court extends detention of Gaza flotilla activists
item.description: An Israeli court extended the detention of activists who attempted to break the Gaza blockade by sea, amid ongoing tensions over humanitarian access to the Palestinian territory.

item.title: 💶 ECB policymaker says euro-zone recession concerns are real and justified
item.description: A European Central Bank policymaker acknowledged that recession concerns in the eurozone are legitimate, as economic headwinds mount from the Iran conflict's impact on energy prices.

item.title: 🌏 ADB launches finance scheme for critical mineral supply chains
item.description: The Asian Development Bank announced a new financing initiative to strengthen critical mineral supply chains, addressing strategic resource security concerns.

item.title: 🏛️ Senator Reed criticizes Trump on war powers
item.description: Senate Armed Services Committee member Jack Reed criticized President Trump's handling of war powers amid the ongoing Iran conflict.

item.title: 🎖️ Congressman Crow criticizes Trump troop movements
item.description: Representative Jason Crow raised concerns about the Trump administration's military deployments related to the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Spanish PM's plane makes emergency landing in Turkey
item.description: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez's aircraft made an emergency landing in Turkey due to a technical fault, highlighting the aviation challenges in the region.

item.title: 💹 Hong Kong's new listing pipeline undeterred by Iran war volatility
item.description: Hong Kong's stock market continues with new listings despite market turbulence from the Iran conflict, showing confidence in the financial hub's resilience.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Nobel laureate Mohammadi remains in critical condition in Iran
item.description: Jailed Nobel Peace Prize laureate Narges Mohammadi remains in critical condition in a cardiac care unit in northwestern Iran, two days after being hospitalized from prison, according to her family's foundation.

item.title: 🏝️ Asian Development Bank offers help to Pacific countries hit by Iran war
item.description: The Asian Development Bank announced assistance for Pacific island nations affected by economic fallout from the Iran conflict, including disrupted shipping and energy costs.
